name: Chocolate Passion Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fudge brownies into 1/2 inch cubes.
2. In a 3-quart serving bowl, layer half of the brownie cubes, 1 cup of sliced strawberries, 1 sliced banana, and 1 tub of Cool Whip.
3. Repeat the layers with the remaining ingredients.
4. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
